---
title: Les Magnétiques
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557608/magnetiques_20211211_kafl5g.png
description: Les Magnétiques
categories: [fanart]
date: 2021-12-11
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557608/magnetiques_20211211_kafl5g.png)

::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
